name: AAR CORP
summary: PART I General AAR CORP. and its subsidiaries are referred to herein collectively as AAR, Company, we, us, and our unless the context indicates otherwise. AAR was incorporated in 1955 and we are a leading independent provider of solutions to the global aviation aftermarket. We offer a broad line of products and services to commercial and government aerospace customers. We operate globally in over 20 countries through four business segments: Parts Supply, Repair & Engineering, Integrated Solution...
